column1: # Dataset 2 — Layered patterns (biweekly sign flip + decaying weekly)
# - Cycle INVERTS sign on Apr 15 (multiply by -1 from that day on)
# - Weekly with linear amplitude decay from Jan (1.0) to Jun (0.0):
# - Growing monthly spike on dom=20: Jan +10
# - Monthly dip on dom=13: -40 (every 13th of the month)
